# Equilibrium Finance — design system as generated by Stitch

Source: Stitch project 17248335032802531831, design system asset
`assets/68858245aabd424fb25258447e2eb029`, captured 2026-07-17.
Known vocabulary infections to strip during distillation (per memlog):
"compa-ratio" (spec non-goal) and "Snapshot Date" (must be "as-of date").

---

## Brand & Style
Engineered for high-stakes HR salary management, prioritizing clarity over
decoration. Brand personality: calm, precise, unhurried. Corporate/Modern
with Data-Dense Minimalism — a "financial broadsheet" sensibility: orderly,
information-rich, intellectually honest. The UI recedes to let data lead,
using thin lines and subtle tonal shifts.

## Colors
Restrained professional palette. Primary: deep Slate (#1E293B) for
navigation and headings. Secondary: muted blue-grays. Surfaces: layered
near-whites (#F8FAFC base, #F1F5F9 section tint). Accent semantics:
Indigo (#6366F1) for standard highlights, Quiet Amber for outliers /
attention states — never red/green success-fail semantics. Refusal
states: soft gray tint (#F8FAFC/#F1F5F9) with a distinct hairline
border — neutrality, not error.

## Typography
Hanken Grotesk for UI labels and headings. JetBrains Mono for ALL
numerical data, currency, and percentages — monospacing aligns columns
of numbers for instant scanning. label-caps for table headers and
metadata; number-md for primary data points; tight line heights for
density.

## Layout & Spacing
Fixed-fluid hybrid grid: fixed side nav + header, fluid data workspace.
Compact spacing (4px base). Table rows 32–40px. White space is
functional, not decorative. Breakpoints: desktop 1280px+ full table
view; tablet 768–1279px prioritizes columns.

## Elevation & Depth
No shadows — flat broadsheet aesthetic. Hierarchy via tonal layering
and hairline borders. L0 background #F8FAFC; L1 cards #FFFFFF with 1px
#E2E8F0 border; L2 modals #FFFFFF with 1px #CBD5E1 border and subtle
ambient blur. Refusal states: flat #F1F5F9 fill (or subtle diagonal
hatch) — never grayed-out text.

## Shapes
Soft (0.25rem). Inputs/buttons 4px radius; status badges 2px
(near-sharp, document-like); data visualizations use squared ends.

## Components
- Tabular data lists: sticky headers, #F1F5F9 hover rows, monospaced
  numeric columns.
- Pulse charts: compact sparkline-style bars embedded near tables.
- Status labels: small rectangular low-saturation badges — Indigo "in
  range", Amber "outlier" (#fef3c7 bg / #92400e text).
- Date control: persistent header dropdown for the as-of date.
- Input fields: 1px border, focus shifts to primary slate; no shadows.
- Action buttons: primary solid slate (#1E293B); secondary ghost with
  subtle border.
- Peer group dividers: 2px horizontal rules grouping table sections.
